_meta.build_purpose: ENGINEERING CANARY for MA50W10 strategy — validates BOTH plumbing AND live execution behavior of the only L99-validated edge
patches_applied: PATCH 2: STALE_OHLCV_DETECTOR — refuses signal on stale candles
PATCH 3: OFF_BY_ONE_FIX — DD trigger uses <= for boundary correctness

exchange.name: gate
exchange._isolation_note: API key MUST come from a separate Gate.io sub-account funded with $100 USDT max. Main L99 keys MUST NOT be in this file.

trading._note_binary_scaling: MA50W10 is binary 100% in or 100% out. Canary scales down to fixed $30/trade for safety. Expect 0-2 trades in 48h (strategy averages ~10 trades/year).

strategy_ma50w10._no_tp_sl_note: MA50W10 has NO fixed TP/SL — exits driven by MA flip only. DD cap remains as emergency safety.

risk._no_martingale_note: Position sizing is fixed $30. Does NOT respond to losses.
risk._no_self_modify_note: No parameter editing endpoints. No auto-tuning.

ohlcv_freshness._note_patch2: STALE_OHLCV_DETECTOR refuses signal if latest candle is older than threshold. Held positions exit defensively on stale data.

checks: no orphan open orders if state says flat
BTC balance ≤ dust if state says flat
exchange BTC matches state.position.size if state says long
startup_reconcile._note_patch1: EXECUTOR_STARTUP_RECONCILE refuses to start if exchange disagrees with state file.

telemetry.banner: 🟡 LIVE MODE CANARY · MA50W10 · BTC/USDT · MAX $100 · MAX 48h · MAX -$2 DD
